sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By using the service, you fully agree to these terms. If you do not agree, you must stop using the service immediately. Continued use after updates means you accept the updated terms.

sections.title: Account Responsibility
sections.content: You are responsible for your account, including your username, password, linked accounts, and all activity performed on your account. You are responsible for remembering your password. There is no guaranteed recovery system.

sections.title: Account Recovery
sections.content: If you forget your username, password, or email, you may contact staff through a Discord ticket. Recovery is only possible if your Discord account is linked to the website account. Recovery is not guaranteed and may be denied at staff discretion.

sections.title: Username Responsibility
sections.content: You are responsible for your username. Usernames that are offensive, inappropriate, misleading, or impersonate staff may result in forced change or ban.

sections.title: Email and 2FA Responsibility
sections.content: If you add an email for 2FA or verification, you are responsible for that email. We are not responsible if you lose access to your email or cannot receive verification codes. We are not responsible for where your email is stored or how it is handled.

sections.title: Public Profiles and Visibility
sections.content: You agree that your account may be searchable. Other users and staff may view your profile information including Username, User ID, Discord ID, Roblox ID, Join date, Completed quests, Rewards and statistics, Linked accounts.

sections.title: Data Display and Delays
sections.content: Quests, rewards, balances, and statistics may not update instantly. They may be delayed or not appear correctly on the dashboard or profile. We are not responsible if something does not update immediately or ever visually display correctly.

sections.title: Quests and Rewards
sections.content: Rewards, quests, giveaways, and features are not guaranteed. They may be changed, delayed, or removed at any time. Completion does not guarantee payout unless approved and processed.

sections.title: Linked Accounts
sections.content: You are responsible for linking your Discord, Roblox, or other accounts correctly. Failure to link accounts properly may prevent recovery, rewards, or support.

sections.title: Support System
sections.content: Support may be provided through Discord, website tickets, or email. Staff have full authority over tickets. Staff may close tickets, deny requests, ignore requests, escalate or reassign tickets. You may request a higher staff review, but it is not guaranteed.

sections.title: Ticket Risks and Leaks
sections.content: We are not responsible for any leaks, screenshots, or exposure of messages in Discord tickets, website tickets, email support, or any support communication.

sections.title: Staff Authority
sections.content: Staff decisions are final unless overridden by higher staff. Staff may deny any request for any reason allowed by policy.

sections.title: Logging and Monitoring
sections.content: All activity may be logged including login attempts, actions on the website, support interactions, and Discord activity. Logs may be reviewed at any time for moderation and security.

sections.title: IP Storage and Security
sections.content: Your IP address may be stored for security, anti-spam, and abuse prevention. If you attempt to spam, exploit, abuse systems, or attack the service, your IP or account may be blocked.

sections.title: Account Security
sections.content: You are responsible for keeping your account secure. Any actions performed on your account are considered your responsibility.

sections.title: Exploits and Abuse
sections.content: You may not exploit bugs, automate actions, bypass protections, or manipulate rewards. Any abuse may result in reward removal or ban.

sections.title: Alternate Accounts
sections.content: Using alt accounts to gain rewards or bypass restrictions is not allowed. This includes website accounts, Roblox accounts, and Discord accounts. Violations may result in bans.

sections.title: Prohibited Behavior
sections.content: You may not impersonate staff, abuse support systems, submit false claims, harass or threaten others, or attempt unauthorized access.

sections.title: Bans and Enforcement
sections.content: You may be banned for violating rules or for any reason deemed necessary by staff. Bans may be temporary or permanent. Appeals are not guaranteed.

sections.title: Service Availability
sections.content: The service may be unavailable at any time due to maintenance, updates, or errors. We are not responsible for downtime or interruptions.

sections.title: Data and Security Disclaimer
sections.content: We take reasonable steps to protect data, but security is not guaranteed. We are not responsible for data leaks, unauthorized access, or breaches outside our control.

sections.title: Feature Changes
sections.content: Any feature, page, or system may be changed or removed at any time without notice.

sections.title: Right to Refuse Service
sections.content: We may restrict or deny access to any user at any time.

sections.title: Independence
sections.content: This service is not affiliated with or endorsed by Roblox.

sections.title: No Guarantees
sections.content: We do not guarantee rewards, support outcomes, account recovery, or feature availability.

sections.title: User Submissions
sections.content: Anything you submit may be stored, reviewed, or used for moderation.

sections.title: No Liability
sections.content: We are not responsible for damages, losses, or issues resulting from use of the service.

sections.title: Enforcement Rights
sections.content: Failure to enforce a rule does not remove our right to enforce it later.

sections.title: Changes to Terms
sections.content: These terms may be updated at any time. Continued use means you accept the changes.

sections.title: Final Agreement
sections.content: By using the service, you confirm that you accept all terms, understand your responsibilities, and agree to staff authority and system rules.
